text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Contrary to what was reported earlier the Lebanese Red Cross has recovered one of the journalist while the other journalist Amal Khalil remains missing. While the Lebanese Red Cross was recovering the bodies of the two people that were killed in…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Photo showcases Israeli gunfire on a Lebanese Red Cross vehicle, despite approval from the mechanism. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 与早先报道的情况相反，黎巴嫩红十字会已找到其中一名记者，而另一名记者阿迈勒·哈利勒（Amal Khalil）仍然下落不明。在黎巴嫩红十字会打捞两名遇难者遗体时……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇫🇷 🇺🇳 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 照片显示，尽管已获得机制批准，以色列军队仍向黎巴嫩红十字会车辆开火。@wfwitness

text: US Ambassador to Türkiye Tom Barrack on Israel & Hezbollah: Everybody has been equally untrustworthy. We have never trusted Hezbollah. You cannot eliminate an embedded militia solely by kinetic means. Pure ‘mowing the lawn’ has never worked. Endless war is idiocy, we need enforceable outcomes. Source: Fox News
text_zh: 美国驻土耳其大使汤姆·巴拉克（Tom Barrack）谈及以色列与真主党：各方同样不可信。我们从未信任过真主党。你无法仅通过军事手段消灭一支根深蒂固的民兵组织。单纯的“割草”策略从未奏效。无休止的战争是愚蠢的，我们需要可执行的成果。来源：福克斯新闻

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WaPo: U.S. officials have warned that clearing sea mines in the Strait of Hormuz could take up to six months, highlighting a major obstacle to reopening one of the world’s most critical shipping routes. Iran may have deployed dozens of mines using small boats and GPS-guided methods, making them difficult to detect and remove. The prolonged presence of mines means that even if a ceasefire holds, commercial shipping and energy flows could remain disrupted for months, keeping pressure on global oil and gas markets. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华盛顿邮报》：美国官员警告称，清除霍尔木兹海峡的水雷可能需要长达六个月的时间，这凸显了重新开放全球最关键航运路线之一所面临的重大障碍。伊朗可能已利用小型船只和GPS制导方式部署了数十枚水雷，使其难以被发现和清除。水雷的长期存在意味着，即使停火协议达成，商业航运和能源流动仍可能中断数月，从而持续给全球石油和天然气市场带来压力。@wfwitness

text: 📝 Бои у Гришино 📝 На южном фланге Добропольского направления бойцы ГВ «Центр» расширяют зону контроля в окрестностях Гришино . Днем 21 апреля поступили данные о полной зачистке от противника территории села. Тем не менее его окраины все еще находятся в «серой зоне», а закрепиться на них российские войска смогут лишь после окончательной ликвидации вклинения противника в районе трассы М-30. ➡️ В то же время на центральном участке направления обстановка остаётся напряженной. Наиболее тяжелые столкновения идут в окрестностях бывшей шахты «Запорожская» и шахты «Нововодянская №2» , куда противник регулярно отправляет малые пехотные группы для сдерживания продвижения ВС РФ. В то же время штурмовики «Центра» пока не могут переломить ход боёв ввиду обилия дронов ВСУ, препятствующих организации стабильного снабжения в «серой зоне» у шахт. ➡️ На северном фланге направления бойцы предпринимают попытки закрепиться на территории Нового Донбасса , однако сталкиваются с аналогичными проблемами. Уверенного контроля над разрушенным селом пока нет ни у одной из сторон. Обстановка на рубеже Новое Шахово — Торецкое — Павловка пока остается без изменений. Активность обеих сторон на этом участке относительно низкая из-за второстепенности участка. 📌 После зачистки вклинения у трассы М-30 и уверенного закрепления в Белицком ВС РФ смогут приступить к формированию флангового охвата Доброполья с нескольких сторон. Контроль над городом, в свою очередь, необходим российским войскам для дальнейшего продвижения на север оккупированной части ДНР. Если у Вас есть дополнения по обстановке, Вы хотите, чтобы мы подсветили успехи Вашего подразделения, — Вы всегда можете написать нам в бот обратной связи @rybar_feedback_bot 📍 Карта в высоком разрешении 📍 English version 📍 Онлайн-карты доступны по подписке на map.rybar.ru #дайджест #Доброполье #карта #Россия #Украина ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ ОК | ✉️ Дзен 💸 Поддержать нас
text_zh: 📝 格里希诺（Grishino）附近的战斗 📝 在多布罗波利耶（Dobropolye）方向的南翼，俄军“中央”集团军的士兵正在扩大格里希诺周边的控制区。4月21日白天有消息称，该村庄领土已完全清除敌军。然而，其郊区仍处于“灰色地带”，俄军只有在彻底消除敌军在M-30公路区域的楔入点后，才能在这些地区站稳脚跟。 ➡️ 与此同时，该方向中心地段的局势依然紧张。最激烈的冲突发生在原“扎波罗热”矿井和“新沃季扬斯卡娅2号”矿井周边，敌军定期派遣小型步兵小组前往此处以阻滞俄军推进。与此同时，“中央”集团军的突击部队由于乌军无人机数量众多，阻碍了在矿井附近“灰色地带”组织稳定的补给，目前尚无法扭转战局。 ➡️ 在该方向的北翼，士兵们正试图在“新顿巴斯”领土上站稳脚跟，但遇到了类似的问题。目前双方均未对该被摧毁的村庄实现稳固控制。新沙霍沃（Novoye Shakhovo）—托列茨科耶（Toretskoye）—巴甫洛夫卡（Pavlovka）一线的局势目前保持不变。由于该地段处于次要地位，双方在此处的活动相对较低。 📌 在清除M-30公路附近的楔入点并稳固控制别利茨科耶（Belitskoye）后，俄军将能够开始从多个方向对多布罗波利耶形成侧翼包围。反过来，控制该市对于俄军进一步向顿涅茨克人民共和国（DNR）被占领地区的北部推进至关重要。如果您有关于局势的补充信息，或者希望我们报道您所在部队的战绩，您可以随时通过反馈机器人 @rybar_feedback_bot 给我们留言。 📍 高清地图 📍 英文版 📍 在线地图可通过订阅 map.rybar.ru 获取 #摘要 #多布罗波利耶 #地图 #俄罗斯 #乌克兰 ✈ RU | ✈ EN | ✉ MAX ✉️ VK | ✉️ RuTube | ✉️ OK | ✉️ Dzen 💸 支持我们

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. Senator Graham spoke with U.S. President Trump and Secretary of War Hegseth this morning. He reports that Trump’s decision to leave the blockade in place is very smart and that he expects it to stay in place until Iran shows they’re committed to changing their ways. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国参议员格雷厄姆（Graham）今天上午与美国总统特朗普和战争部长海格塞斯（Hegseth）进行了交谈。他报告称，特朗普决定维持封锁是非常明智的，并预计在伊朗表现出致力于改变其行为之前，封锁将一直持续。@wfwitness

text: Pakistani officials say they still hope to restart talks between the United States and Iran, despite new tensions after Iran seized two cargo ships in the Strait of Hormuz. Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif met Iran’s ambassador on Wednesday, and officials believe a second round of negotiations could take place within days. Source: NYT
text_zh: 巴基斯坦官员表示，尽管伊朗在霍尔木兹海峡扣押了两艘货船导致局势再度紧张，但他们仍希望重启美国与伊朗之间的谈判。巴基斯坦总理夏巴兹·谢里夫周三会见了伊朗大使，官员们认为第二轮谈判可能会在几天内举行。来源：纽约时报

text: Someone get his schizophrenia pills 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 谁去给他拿点精神分裂症药吧 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: Israel has been informed by the U.S. administration that U.S. President Trump has set a new deadline for Iran: this coming Sunday. Although Trump did not specifically mention the date, that is the understanding in Israel following…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan : Israel has been informed that U.S. President Trump has set a new Sunday deadline for Iran. A diplomatic source estimates Trump wants to reach agreements, not just hold talks, but Israeli officials say it is unlikely the sides will reach understandings by Sunday. “We are only updated on Trump’s moves from the news and his social media," an Israeli official said. A White House official told Fox News that the ceasefire would be extended by three to five days, though an Israeli source said the situation is unclear and depends on Trump’s mood. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：以色列已获美国政府通知，美国总统特朗普为伊朗设定了新的最后期限：即本周日。尽管特朗普没有明确提及具体日期，但这是以色列在美国更新消息后的理解……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Kan：以色列已获悉美国总统特朗普为伊朗设定了新的周日最后期限。一位外交消息人士估计，特朗普希望达成协议，而不仅仅是举行会谈，但以色列官员表示，双方不太可能在周日前达成谅解。“我们只能从新闻和他的社交媒体上了解特朗普的举动，”一位以色列官员说。一位白宫官员告诉福克斯新闻，停火协议将延长三到五天，尽管一位以色列消息人士称情况尚不明确，取决于特朗普的心情。@wfwitness

text: House Democrat leader Hakeem Jeffries: Donald Trump is clearly the dumbest person ever to sit at 1600 Pennsylvania Avenue.
text_zh: 众议院民主党领袖哈基姆·杰弗里斯：唐纳德·特朗普显然是入主宾夕法尼亚大道1600号以来最愚蠢的人。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: The United States has communicated with Israel that the deadline for Iran is set for Sunday. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: Israel has been informed by the U.S. administration that U.S. President Trump has set a new deadline for Iran: this coming Sunday. Although Trump did not specifically mention the date, that is the understanding in Israel following the American update. The timeline corresponds to the arrival of the third U.S. aircraft carrier in the region. Israeli Prime Minister Netanyahu is expected to hold further discussions tomorrow to complete defence and attack preparations. Israel assesses that no agreement is possible unless one side makes a dramatic concession, and under current circumstances, the military scenario is seen as the most likely. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：美国已向以色列传达，伊朗的最后期限设定在周日。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：以色列已获美国政府通知，美国总统特朗普为伊朗设定了新的最后期限：即本周日。尽管特朗普没有明确提及具体日期，但这是以色列在美国更新消息后的理解。该时间表与美国第三艘航空母舰抵达该地区的时间相吻合。预计以色列总理内塔尼亚胡明天将举行进一步讨论，以完成防御和进攻准备。以色列评估认为，除非一方做出重大让步，否则不可能达成协议，在当前情况下，军事方案被视为最有可能的选择。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: The United States has communicated with Israel that the deadline for Iran is set for Sunday. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：美国已向以色列传达，伊朗的最后期限设定在周日。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliamentary speaker Ghalibaf explained that a complete ceasefire only makes sense if it it’s not violated by maritime blockades and detaining vessel crew members. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫解释说，只有在不被海上封锁和扣押船员行为破坏的情况下，全面停火才有意义。@wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 CBS News: Iran maintains more military capabilities than the White House or Pentagon has publicly admitted, according to multiple U.S. officials with knowledge of intelligence on the matter. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 CBS新闻：据多位了解相关情报的美国官员称，伊朗拥有的军事能力超过了白宫或五角大楼公开承认的水平。🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: BREAKING: Trump: Very good news! I have just been informed that the eight women protestors who were going to be executed tonight in Iran will no longer be killed. Four will be released immediately, and four will be sentenced to one month in prison. I very much appreciate that Iran, and its leaders, respected my request, as President of the United States, and terminated the planned execution. Thank you for your attention to this matter!
text_zh: 突发：特朗普：非常好的消息！我刚刚获悉，今晚在伊朗将被处决的八名女性抗议者将不再被处死。四人将立即获释，四人将被判处一个月监禁。我非常感谢伊朗及其领导人尊重我作为美国总统提出的请求，并终止了计划中的处决。感谢你们对此事的关注！

text: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 President Trump is giving Iran a few days to present a peace plan, signaling that the ceasefire extension will not be open-ended, WSJ reports. ➡️ U.S. officials said the delay of talks came after Trump and his team on Tuesday agreed Iran's government has some internal disagreements on a way forward, giving Tehran time to form a unified position. ➡️ While Trump is hesitant to resume military action, he has not ruled it out and has continued discussing potential future operations with aides. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据《华尔街日报》报道，特朗普总统正在给伊朗几天时间提出和平计划，这表明停火延期不会无限期持续。➡️ 美国官员表示，会谈推迟是因为特朗普及其团队周二认为伊朗政府在前进道路上存在一些内部分歧，因此给德黑兰时间形成统一立场。➡️ 虽然特朗普对恢复军事行动持谨慎态度，但他并未排除这种可能性，并继续与助手讨论未来潜在的行动。推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - EU approves €90bn loan for Ukraine as Druzhba pipeline pumping Russian oil into Hungary and Slovakia is turned back on — BBC https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046991447539282368/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 刚刚消息 - 欧盟批准向乌克兰提供900亿欧元贷款，同时向匈牙利和斯洛伐克输送俄罗斯石油的友谊输油管道已重新开启 — BBC https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2046991447539282368/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel A large forest fire broke out in Ōtsuchi Town, Iwate Prefecture, Japan. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046990934038966771/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 日本岩手县大槌町发生大面积森林火灾。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046990934038966771/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump: Very good news! I have just been informed that the eight women protestors who were going to be executed tonight in Iran will no longer be killed. Four will be released immediately, and four will be sentenced to one month in prison. I very much appreciate that Iran, and its leaders, respected my request, as President of the United States, and terminated the planned execution. Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普：非常好的消息！我刚刚获悉，今晚在伊朗将被处决的八名女性抗议者将不再被处死。四人将立即获释，四人将被判处一个月监禁。我非常感谢伊朗及其领导人尊重我作为美国总统提出的请求，并终止了计划中的处决。感谢你们对此事的关注！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Contrary to what was reported earlier the Lebanese Red Cross has recovered one of the journalist while the other journalist Amal Khalil remains missing. While the Lebanese Red Cross was recovering the bodies of the two people that were killed in…" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Urgent efforts are underway by Lebanese authorities to rescue journalist Amal Khalil, who remains missing in Tiri (Bint Jbeil). Lebanese President Joseph Aoun is following the situation closely, calling for immediate coordination with the Lebanese Army, UNIFIL, and the Red Cross to secure her evacuation as soon as possible. Despite the threats, the Lebanese Army will accompany the Red Cross in a new attempt to rescue her, noting that Israel did not respond to the mechanism's request to allow the rescue after targeting the Red Cross during the previous attempt. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 与早先报道的情况相反，黎巴嫩红十字会已救出一名记者，而另一名记者阿迈勒·哈利勒（Amal Khalil）仍然下落不明。当黎巴嫩红十字会正在回收两名遇难者的遗体时……” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 黎巴嫩当局正在紧急努力营救在提里（宾特朱拜勒）失踪的记者阿迈勒·哈利勒。黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun）正在密切关注局势，呼吁与黎巴嫩军队、联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）和红十字会立即协调，以尽快确保她获救。尽管面临威胁，黎巴嫩军队仍将陪同红十字会进行新的营救尝试，并指出以色列并未回应机制方提出的允许营救的请求，此前以色列曾在红十字会尝试营救时对其进行了袭击。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 No Hormuz, no stable oil. Brent proves it — Brent crude jumped above $100 as tensions in the Strait of Hormuz shake global supply. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 没有霍尔木兹海峡，就没有稳定的石油供应。布伦特原油证明了这一点——由于霍尔木兹海峡的紧张局势动摇了全球供应，布伦特原油价格跳升至100美元以上。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Al Jadeed: The Lebanese Red Cross has successfully evacuated the journalists and the 2 people killed in the Israel airstrike on the town of Tiri, southern Lebanon. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 Contrary to what was reported earlier the Lebanese Red Cross has recovered one of the journalist while the other journalist Amal Khalil remains missing. While the Lebanese Red Cross was recovering the bodies of the two people that were killed in a drone strike in the area the IDF launched a stun grenade on the team despite approval from the mechanism to operate in the area. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇱🇧🇺🇳🇮🇱 Al Jadeed：黎巴嫩红十字会已成功撤离了在以色列对黎巴嫩南部提里镇的空袭中遇难的记者和2名平民。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇮🇱 与早先报道的情况相反，黎巴嫩红十字会已救出一名记者，而另一名记者阿迈勒·哈利勒仍然下落不明。当黎巴嫩红十字会正在回收该地区无人机袭击中两名遇难者的遗体时，尽管已获得在该地区行动的机制批准，以色列国防军（IDF）仍向该团队投掷了眩晕弹。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 US Treasury Secretary: Sanctions exemptions for Russian and Iranian maritime oil have been extended for 30 days. 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost
text_zh: 🇺🇸 美国财政部长：针对俄罗斯和伊朗海上石油的制裁豁免已延长30天。 🚩 ResistanceTrench | Boost

text: Clearing Iranian mines from the Strait of Hormuz could take up to six months, the Pentagon told Congress. The estimate was shared in a classified briefing to the House Armed Services Committee. Source: WaPo
text_zh: 五角大楼告诉国会，清除霍尔木兹海峡的伊朗水雷可能需要长达六个月的时间。这一评估是在向众议院军事委员会提交的机密简报中分享的。来源：《华盛顿邮报》

text: 🇮🇷 Over 30 IRGC fast boats spotted near the Strait of Hormuz. The New York Times previously reported that the US military has failed to destroy Iran's "mosquito fleet" blocking the strait. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 在霍尔木兹海峡附近发现了30多艘伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）的快艇。《纽约时报》此前报道称，美军未能摧毁封锁海峡的伊朗“蚊子舰队”。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says oil could have hit $150 if the US had not eased anti-Russia sanctions. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 财政部长斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）表示，如果美国没有放宽对俄制裁，油价本可能达到150美元。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Senator Graham: I expect the blockade will be growing and that it could become global soon.
text_zh: 格雷厄姆参议员：我预计封锁范围将会扩大，并且很快可能演变成全球性事件。

text: 🇮🇷 Iranian Parliament Speaker Mohammad Bagher Ghalibaf 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 伊朗议会议长穆罕默德·巴盖尔·卡利巴夫 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Iran’s Ghalibaf: A complete ceasefire only makes sense if it is not violated by the maritime blockade and the hostage-taking of the world’s economy, and if the Zionist warmongering across all fronts is halted; reopening the Strait of Hormuz is impossible with such a flagrant breach of the ceasefire. They did not achieve their goals through military aggression, nor will they through bullying. The only way forward is to recognize the rights of the Iranian nation.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：只有在不违反海上封锁和不劫持世界经济的前提下，且犹太复国主义者在各条战线上的战争挑衅行为停止时，全面停火才有意义；在如此公然违反停火协议的情况下，重新开放霍尔木兹海峡是不可能的。他们没有通过军事侵略实现目标，通过霸凌也无法实现。唯一的出路是承认伊朗民族的权利。

text: Open Source Intel Netanyahu: Prepared for every scenario - in defense and offense https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046990295225471281/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 内塔尼亚胡：为防御和进攻的每一种情况做好准备 https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046990295225471281/photo/1 推文

text: Status-6 (War & Military News) The Islamic Republic of Iran maintains more military capabilities than the White House or Pentagon has publicly admitted, according to multiple US officials with knowledge of intelligence on the matter. - About half of Iran's stockpile of ballistic missiles and its associated launch systems were still intact as of the start of the ceasefire in early April, US officials told CBS News. - Roughly 60% of the naval arm of the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps is still in existence, per officials, including fast-attack speed boats; - Iranian Air Force has been "significantly degraded but not erased," with about two-thirds of it believed to be still operational, the officials added. https://www.cbsnews.com/news/iran-more-capable-than-trump-admin-publicly-acknowledging/ tweet
text_zh: Status-6（战争与军事新闻）据多位了解相关情报的美国官员称，伊朗伊斯兰共和国拥有的军事能力超过了白宫或五角大楼公开承认的水平。美国官员告诉哥伦比亚广播公司新闻（CBS News），截至4月初停火开始时，伊朗约一半的弹道导弹库存及其相关发射系统仍然完好无损。据官员称，伊斯兰革命卫队海军力量中约60%仍然存在，包括快速攻击快艇；官员们补充说，伊朗空军“受到严重削弱但未被消灭”，据信约三分之二仍可运作。 https://www.cbsnews.com/news/iran-more-capable-than-trump-admin-publicly-acknowledging/ 推文

text: Open Source Intel AP: Hundreds of migrants, most from Haiti, left Tapachula on foot seeking better living conditions elsewhere in Mexico. Many said they no longer expect to reach the United States because of asylum restrictions imposed by the Trump administration. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 美联社：数百名移民（大多数来自海地）徒步离开塔帕丘拉，在墨西哥其他地方寻求更好的生活条件。许多人表示，由于特朗普政府实施的庇护限制，他们不再指望能到达美国。 推文

text: Nuno Felix Yes…. https://x.com/felix_nuno/status/1916493532707033477?s=46 Two things can be true at the same time: 1. Russia's economy is in deepening crisis that without a change of course could threaten cohesion of a post-Putin Russian state. 2. As long as Putin holds the system he built together the Russian state remains an acute threat to Europe. - Alexander Clarkson  tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 是的…… https://x.com/felix_nuno/status/1916493532707033477?s=46 两件事可以同时成立：1. 俄罗斯经济正陷入日益严重的危机，如果不改变方针，可能会威胁到后普京时代俄罗斯国家的凝聚力。2. 只要普京维持他建立的体系，俄罗斯国家对欧洲来说就仍然是一个严重的威胁。 - Alexander Clarkson  推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @APHClarkson : Two things can be true at the same time: 1. Russia's economy is in deepening crisis that without a change of course could threaten cohesion of a post-Putin Russian state. 2. As long as Putin holds the system he built together the Russian state remains an acute threat to Europe. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @APHClarkson ：两件事可以同时成立：1. 俄罗斯经济正陷入日益严重的危机，如果不改变方针，可能会威胁到后普京时代俄罗斯国家的凝聚力。2. 只要普京维持他建立的体系，俄罗斯国家对欧洲来说就仍然是一个严重的威胁。 推文

text: Visioner 🇩🇪 German Defense Minister Pistorius announced a large-scale modernization of the Bundeswehr with the aim of creating the strongest army in Europe. It is planned to de-bureaucratize and modernize the Bundeswehr, and the number of active military personnel, as well as reservists, is expected to increase to 460,000 by 2035. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇩🇪 德国国防部长皮斯托留斯宣布对联邦国防军进行大规模现代化改造，旨在打造欧洲最强大的军队。计划对联邦国防军进行去官僚化和现代化改造，预计到2035年，现役军人和预备役人员的数量将增加到46万人。与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lukashenko: "I am not a dictator; I don't have the resource to dictate. Now Trump has this resource, and he dictates." https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046988324133310619/video/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报 卢卡申科：“我不是独裁者；我没有资源去发号施令。现在特朗普拥有这种资源，所以他在发号施令。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2046988324133310619/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix The enemies of Europe are out there…. Even old European hands are beginning to realise that Ursula-in-the-bunker is going increasingly insane. I’d suggest pumping gaseous valium into the ventilation to calm her down. 🇪🇺 - Philip Pilkington tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 欧洲的敌人就在外面……即使是老牌欧洲政客也开始意识到，地堡里的乌尔苏拉正变得越来越疯狂。我建议往通风系统里泵入气态安定药来让她冷静下来。 🇪🇺 - Philip Pilkington 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @AndreasSteno : The market will take care of the jetfuel scarcities itself in Europe for example. When flight prices are up 2-3x for the summer season, fewer people will fly. It is as simple as that. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @AndreasSteno ：市场会自行解决欧洲的航空燃油短缺问题。例如，当夏季机票价格上涨2-3倍时，飞行的人就会减少。就是这么简单。 推文

text: Visioner 🚨 Greek Foreign Minister to CNN: A Greek-owned cargo ship under the Liberian flag was attacked near the Strait of Hormuz. It is not yet clear if it was seized by the Iranians https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046987003728740850/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🚨 希腊外交部长对CNN表示：一艘悬挂利比里亚国旗的希腊货船在霍尔木兹海峡附近遭到袭击。目前尚不清楚是否被伊朗人扣押 https://twitter.com/visionergeo/status/2046987003728740850/video/1 推文
